ddls:
CREATE TABLE "suicide_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data is collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the population (e.g., male, female) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 15-24 years) */,
  "suicides_no" INTEGER /* Number of suicides */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population size for the given age group and sex */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of suicide */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the suicide occurred */,
  "urban_rural" TEXT /* Urban or rural location */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or description of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_data_sex FOREIGN KEY ("sex") REFERENCES sex ("sex_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_data_year FOREIGN KEY ("year") REFERENCES years ("year_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suicide_data_age_group FOREIGN KEY ("age_group") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Average life expectancy */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Percentage of GDP spent on healthcare */,
  "suicide_rate" REAL /* Overall suicide rate per 100,000 population */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the country data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category (e.g., male, female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  "code" TEXT /* Standardized code for sex */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color code for visualization purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., 15-24 years) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Range of ages for the group */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order in which age groups are typically listed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the year is the current year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the data source */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality rating or description of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES suicide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the file is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES suicide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES suicide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the dataset */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data file associated with the version */,
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the readme file associated with the version */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_readme_id FOREIGN KEY ("readme_id") REFERENCES readme_files ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES suicide_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was added */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the annotation */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the annotation is private */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the annotation is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES suicide_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
